text: I feel a sense of anticipation, standing at the threshold between the outside world and a space dedicated to research and development. The glass doors suggest transparency and openness, while the vibrant colors of the exhibit wall inside awaken my curiosity. I am poised at the intersection of safety and innovation—my mind is alert, ready to reflect on the ways human ingenuity shapes our environments. There is an undercurrent of excitement at witnessing the intersection of humanity and technology.
